steps.title: Fastest path: use the function table
steps.content: Enter the function in Desmos or a calculator table, then plug in the requested input. The output is $7$, so the answer is C, 7. This is just a one-row lookup, and the arithmetic below confirms the table value.

steps.title: Substitute x = -1 into f(x)
steps.content: Substitute -1 for x in the definition: $$f(-1)=(-1)^3+3(-1)^2-6(-1)-1$$.

steps.title: Simplify the expression
steps.content:
Compute each term: $$(-1)^3 = -1$$, $$3(-1)^2 = 3$$, $$-6(-1)=6$$, and the constant term is $$-1$$. Add them: $$-1+3+6-1 = 7$$.
Keeping the signs separate prevents the common mistake of turning $(-1)^3$ positive. That confirms C is correct.
